creator: melifaro@FreeBSD.org
text:
There is another vector to consider here.

Currently the process of checking whether arp is eligible for insertion performs lookup under RIB rlock for no apparent reason. Thus, with the constant flow of ARP messages, every rebuild triggers RX queue handling stuck due to the processing of ARP message waiting for RIB lock.

There are 2 ways of addressing it:
1) fixing arp code check
2) deferring such packets to a separate netisr, so we're generally get less sensitive to the complex processing of control plane traffic.


I'll post a patch to address (1) in a day or two.
